1_clean_state_baseline.description: Cleared all existing states using clear_state

2_create_parent_and_subtasks.description: Created Epic: Build Authentication with 2 subtasks using batch creation
2_create_parent_and_subtasks.expected: Both subtasks created with correct parentTaskId and order
2_create_parent_and_subtasks.actual: Epic 'epic-build-authentication' created. Subtasks 'implement-login-ui' (order: 1) and 'implement-api-route' (order: 2) created with correct parentTaskId pointing to epic

3_retrieve_subtasks.expected: Response contains both subtasks in correct order
3_retrieve_subtasks.actual: get_subtasks returned both subtasks: implement-login-ui (order: 1) and implement-api-route (order: 2) in correct order

4_move_and_re_order_tasks.expected: Subtask B now appears before Subtask A
4_move_and_re_order_tasks.actual: After move_task with order: 0, get_subtasks returned implement-api-route (order: 0) before implement-login-ui (order: 1)

5_re_parenting_tasks.description: Created new parent Epic: Backend Setup, moved implement-api-route to it
5_re_parenting_tasks.expected: get_subtasks on Build Authentication only returns Subtask A, get_subtasks on Backend Setup returns Subtask B
5_re_parenting_tasks.actual: get_subtasks on epic-build-authentication returned only implement-login-ui. get_subtasks on epic-backend-setup returned implement-api-route with correct parentTaskId

6_test_auto_completion_of_parent_tasks.description: Created parent with 3 subtasks, completed subtasks individually
6_test_auto_completion_of_parent_tasks.expected: Parent auto-completes when all subtasks completed, completedAt timestamp set
6_test_auto_completion_of_parent_tasks.actual: Created 'implement-api' parent with 3 subtasks. After completing 2 subtasks, parent was still pending. After completing last subtask, parent automatically became completed with completedAt: '2026-07-02T22:28:55.585Z' and updatedAt updated

7_verify_persistence.description: Waited for debounced save, checked thoughtflow-state.json
7_verify_persistence.expected: parentTaskId field accurate, hierarchy maintained correctly on disk
7_verify_persistence.actual: thoughtflow-state.json shows all parentTaskId fields accurate: implement-login-ui parentTaskId: epic-build-authentication, implement-api-route parentTaskId: epic-backend-setup, design-endpoints/implement-auth/add-rate-limiting parentTaskId: implement-api. Hierarchy maintained correctly

key_findings.parent_child_creation: WORKING - Batch creation with positional refs creates parent-child relationships correctly
key_findings.subtask_retrieval: WORKING - get_subtasks returns correct children in order
key_findings.task_reordering: WORKING - move_task changes order correctly, siblings re-sorted on retrieval
key_findings.task_reparenting: WORKING - move_task changes parentTaskId correctly, task removed from old parent and added to new parent
key_findings.auto_completion: WORKING - Parent auto-completes when all subtasks completed
key_findings.completedAt_timestamp: WORKING - completedAt timestamp set correctly on auto-completion
key_findings.persistence: WORKING - Hierarchy persisted correctly to thoughtflow-state.json
